title: Unstable Dream by Sir Thomas Wyatt
content:
Unstable dream, according to the place,
Be steadfast once, or else at least be true.
By tasted sweetness make me not to rue
The sudden loss of thy fal

title: I Find No Peace by Sir Thomas Wyatt
content:
I find no peace, and all my war is done.
I fear and hope. I burn and freeze like ice.
I fly above the wind, yet can I not arise;
And nought I have, an

title: Farewell Love and All Thy Laws Forever by Sir Thomas Wyatt
content:
Farewell love and all thy laws forever;
Thy baited hooks shall tangle me no more.
Senec and Plato call me from thy lore
To perfect wealth, my wit for
